falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong bullish momentum contradicting the pattern's implied bearish or sideways bias, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume falls below 50% of the 30-day average on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a collapse in volume would undermine the blowoff score's implication of high-participation volatility, proving the pattern's validity is flawed.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price makes a new 14-day low below the 2022 May Luna bottom's support level (specific price: $12,300)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking this key support would confirm a deeper bearish trend than the pattern suggests, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
